record.summary: Makes the frontend slot real by adding a second allowed value: react-rr7. A parallel SPA source directory (frontend-react/, React 19 + React Router v7 in SPA/data-router mode + Vite) builds into the same backend/web/dist that the web static service serves, hitting the same auth and API endpoints as the Vue SPA (spec 006). The scaffold verb selects the flavor at stamp time; the chassis never ships both to a stamped app.
record.title: Second frontend flavor: React + React Router v7
